scripts.lint:php: wp-env run cli --env-cwd=wp-content/plugins/$(basename "$(pwd)")/ composer run-script lint
scripts.lint:php:fix: wp-env run cli --env-cwd=wp-content/plugins/$(basename "$(pwd)")/ composer run-script format
scripts.lint:php:stan: wp-env run cli --env-cwd=wp-content/plugins/$(basename "$(pwd)")/ composer run-script phpstan
scripts.test:php: npm run wp-env:test -- run cli --env-cwd=wp-content/plugins/$(basename "$(pwd)")/ vendor/bin/phpunit -c phpunit.xml.dist
